name: Fried Onions and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the fat in a heavy skillet.
2. Add the apples and onions to the skillet.
3. Cover and cook slowly until the vegetables are nearly tender.
4. Stir frequently to prevent scorching.
5. Remove the cover.
6. Sprinkle salt and sugar over the apples and onions.
7. Continue cooking until the vegetables are lightly browned.
8. Serve immediately.
